title: Transcript:2019 Halloween event
wikitext:
{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Bob (smith){{!}}Bob|Cook (Lumbridge){{!}}Cook|Donie|Doomsayer|epic mager34|Father Aereck|Grasslegs|Gee|Hans|Hatius Cosaintus|Lumbridge Guide|mad melvin96|Shop keeper (Lumbridge){{!}}Shop keeper|Shop assistant (Lumbridge){{!}}Shop assistant|Snailneck}}

==Starting out==
===Talking to epic mager34===
* '''Player:''' Hi there! What are you doing in there?
* '''epic mager34:''' These goblins have taken me hostage! Please ask them to let me out!
* '''Player:''' Just home teleport back to the castle?
* '''epic mager34:''' I tried, but the goblins hit me and stopped the teleport.
* '''Player:''' Let me talk to them.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the goblins===
''Talking to either [[Snailneck]] or [[Grasslegs]] results in the same dialogue.''
* '''Player:''' Hey, what's going on here?
* '''Snailneck:''' Human go away, we guard prisoner. You want be captured too?
* '''Player:''' No! What did he do to deserve this?
* '''Snailneck:''' Prisoner kill us, now we ghosts in afterlife. We are dead, so we do revenge.
* '''Player:''' But, clearly you are not dea...
* '''Snailneck:''' Go away, or you can make company with prisoner.
* {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to goblins again====
* '''Snailneck:''' Stop bother us. Go talk to prisoner instead, he keep on asking for you. Is annoying.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34===
* '''Player:''' These goblins told me that you killed them. What are they talking about?
* '''epic mager34:''' I have no idea. I'm new here, I just came from Tutorial Island.
* '''Player:''' Oh, welcome to Gielinor! So many adventures await...
* '''epic mager34:''' Could you help me find a way out of here, please?
* '''Player:''' Right, sorry. I could try to see if anyone in Lumbridge knows what's going on.
* '''epic mager34:''' So you'll help me?
* {{topt|Yes, of course!}}
** '''Player:''' Yes, of course!
** '''epic mager34:''' Thank you so much! Please be quick!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Maybe later.}}
** '''Player:''' Maybe later.
** {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to epic mager34 again====
* '''epic mager34:''' Back so soon? Did you talk to someone in Lumbridge to find out what's going on?
* '''Player:''' Not yet, I'll be back soon.
* {{tact|end}}

==Talk of the town==
===Talking to Donie or Gee===
''[[Donie]] and [[Gee]] share the same dialogue.''
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi, have you seen two goblins in ghost costumes nearby?
** '''Donie:''' Hi there! Yes I saw them heading towards Bob's Axes. They looked rather funny in those costumes!
** '''Player:''' Thanks for your help!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Doomsayer===
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi, have you seen two goblins in ghost costumes nearby?
** '''Doomsayer:''' Hi! Yes, I saw them around the Lumbridge Castle kitchen.
** '''Player:''' Thanks for your help!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Hans===
* '''Player:''' Hi, have you seen two goblins in ghost costumes nearby?
* '''Hans:''' Hi! I saw them heading towards the church and then towards the general store.
* '''Player:''' Thanks!
* {{tact|({{TS|Hans|Standard dialogue}} opens.)}}

===Talking to Hatius Cosaintus===
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi, have you seen two goblins in ghost costumes nearby?
** '''Hatius Cosaintus:''' Hi there! Yes I saw them heading towards Bob's Axes. They looked rather funny in those sheets!
** '''Player:''' Thanks for the help!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Lumbridge Guide===
* '''Lumbridge Guide:''' Greetings, adventurer. I am Phileas, the Lumbridge Guide. I am here to give information and directions to new players. Is there anything I can help you with?
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hey, have you seen two goblins passing by here?
** '''Lumbridge Guide:''' Indeed, I have. I think they went towards the general store.
** '''Player:''' Thanks for the help!
** {{tact|end}}

==Eyewitnesses==
''In this section, players could talk to two of the following four: the [[cook]], the [[shop keeper]] (or [[shop assistant|assistant]]), [[Bob]], and [[Father Aereck]]. Below are the 4 possible combinations of dialogue.''

===General store then the cook===
====Talking to the shop keeper or assistant====
* '''Shop keeper:''' Can I help you at all?
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hey, I need your help! A New player has been captured by some goblins over at the watermill!
** '''Shop keeper:''' Oh no! What happened?
** '''Player:''' That's the problem, we don't know. These goblins are dressed up as ghosts, they think they're dead and... It's all very confusing.
** '''Shop keeper:''' Goblins in costumes? They were here earlier today asking for treats. They weren't even willing to pay for them!
** '''Player:''' For treats? I am so confused about this whole thing.
** '''Shop keeper:''' I think the goblins went to another house here in Lumbridge, try looking somewhere else.
** '''Player:''' I'll give it a try, thank you for the help. Just out of curiosity, did you give them any treats for free?
** '''Shop keeper:''' No, we're not a charity!
** '''Player:''' Ehh, I was just asking for a friend!
** {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk about halloween again to the shop keeper or assistant====
* '''Shop keeper:''' Can I help you at all?
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Shop keeper:''' Are you still in here? Go talk to someone else or buy something from our store.
** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to the cook====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi there, I'm looking for some clues regarding two goblins dressed as ghosts!
** '''Cook:''' Oh yeah, they were here before.
** '''Player:''' I just spoke to a shopkeeper, he said they were looking for treats around the area.
** '''Cook:''' Yes, at first they came by trick or treating. Then they started arguing about something.
** '''Player:''' Arguing, you say?
** '''Cook:''' Yes, there was a conflict regarding the sweets. The argument turned into a fistfight, and I am pretty sure they knocked each other out completely at one point.
** '''Player:''' Wow. These goblins never cease to amaze me.
** '''Cook:''' Indeed, they were lying on the ground, outside my door for quite some time. At one point I thought they were dead!
** '''Player:''' I should probably go talk to the captured player again.
** '''Cook:''' Best of luck!
** {{tact|end}}

===The cook then the general store===
====Talking to the cook====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hey, I need your help! A New player has been captured by some goblins over at the watermill!
** '''Cook:''' I thought I heard something weird outside the castle. What happened?
** '''Player:''' We don't know yet. These goblins are dressed up as ghosts, they think they're dead and... It's all very confusing.
** '''Cook:''' Goblins in costumes? Ghost costumes? They went around the castle earlier today, asking for treats!
** '''Player:''' For treats? Where did they go next?
** '''Cook:''' I'm not completely sure. See if anyone else here in Lumbridge knows.
** '''Player:''' Sounds like a good idea. Thank you for the help!
** '''Cook:''' No problem, good luck!
** {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to the cook again====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Cook:''' Are you looking for treats?
** '''Player:''' No thank you, I should go talk to more people in Lumbridge!
** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to the shop keeper or assistant====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi there, I'm looking for some clues regarding two goblins dressed as ghosts!
** '''Shop keeper:''' Oh yeah, they were here before.
** '''Player:''' I just spoke to the cook, he said they were looking for treats around the area.
** '''Shop keeper:''' Yes, at first they came by trick or treating. Then they started arguing about something.
** '''Player:''' Arguing, you say?
** '''Shop keeper:''' Yes, there was a conflict regarding the sweets. The argument turned into a fistfight, and I am pretty sure they knocked each other out completely at one point.
** '''Player:''' Wow. These goblins never cease to amaze me.
** '''Shop keeper:''' Indeed, they were lying on the ground, outside my door for quite some time. At one point I thought they were dead!
** '''Player:''' I should probably go talk to the captured player again.
** '''Shop keeper:''' Best of luck!
** {{tact|end}}

===Bob then Father Aereck===
====Talking to Bob====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hey, I need your help! A New player has been captured by some goblins over at the watermill!
** '''Bob:''' There's always something going on in this town... What happened this time?
** '''Player:''' We don't know yet. These goblins are dressed up as ghosts, they think they're dead and... It's all very confusing.
** '''Bob:''' Goblins in costumes? I saw them passing by the church earlier today, asking Father Aereck for treats.
** '''Player:''' For treats? Where did they go next?
** '''Bob:''' I'm not complete sure. You should see if anyone else here in Lumbridge knows.
** '''Player:''' Sounds like a plan. Thank you for the help!
** '''Bob:''' No problem, good luck!
** {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to Bob again====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Bob:''' Are you looking for treats?
** '''Player:''' No thank you, I should go talk to more people in Lumbridge!
** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Father Aereck====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi there, I'm looking for some clues regarding two goblins dressed as ghosts!
** '''Father Aereck:''' Oh yeah, they were here before.
** '''Player:''' I just spoke to Bob, he said they were looking for treats around the area.
** '''Father Aereck:''' Yes, at first they came by trick or treating. Then they started arguing about something.
** '''Player:''' Arguing, you say?
** '''Father Aereck:''' Yes, there was a conflict regarding the sweets. The argument turned into a fistfight, and I am pretty sure they knocked each other out completely at one point.
** '''Player:''' Wow. These goblins never cease to amaze me.
** '''Father Aereck:''' Indeed, they were lying on the ground, outside my door for quite some time. At one point I thought they were dead!
** '''Player:''' I should probably go talk to the captured player again.
** '''Father Aereck:''' Best of luck!
** {{tact|end}}

===Father Aereck then Bob===
====Talking to Father Aereck====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Father Aereck:''' Welcome to the church of holy Saradomin.
** '''Player:''' Hey, I need your help! A new player has been captured by some goblins over at the watermill!
** '''Father Aereck:''' My lord, what happened?
** '''Player:''' That's the problem, we don't know. These goblins are dressed up as ghosts, they think they're dead and... It's all very confusing.
** '''Father Aereck:''' Goblins in costumes you say? They were here earlier today asking for treats.
** '''Player:''' For treats you say? I have a weird feeling about this whole thing...
** '''Father Aereck:''' I saw the goblins heading to other houses in the area. Maybe you can find more clues someone{{sic}} else.
** '''Player:''' I'll give it a try. Thank you for the help Father.
** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Bob====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi there, I'm looking for some clues regarding two goblins dressed as ghosts!
** '''Bob:''' Oh yeah, they were here before.
** '''Player:''' I just spoke to Father Aereck, he said they were looking for treats around the area.
** '''Bob:''' Yes, at first they came by trick or treating. Then they started arguing about something.
** '''Player:''' Arguing, you say?
** '''Bob:''' Yes, there was a conflict regarding the sweets. The argument turned into a fistfight, and I am pretty sure they knocked each other out completely at one point.
** '''Player:''' Wow. These goblins never cease to amaze me.
** '''Bob:''' Indeed, they were lying on the ground, outside my door for quite some time. At one point I thought they were dead!
** '''Player:''' I should probably go talk to the captured player again.
** '''Bob:''' Best of luck!
** {{tact|end}}

===Eyewitnesses miscellaneous===
''Talking to Donie, Doomsayer, Gee, Hans, Hatius Cosaintus, or the Lumbridge Guide after this point no longer results in any event dialogue.''

====Attempting to talk to the Cook, Bob, or Father Aereck after this point====
* {{topt|About Halloween.}}
** '''Cook:''' How's your adventure going?
** '''Player:''' Good for now, thank you. Now I need to get back to my friend, though!
** {{tact|end}}

==A bedsheet plan==
===Talking to the goblins===
* '''Player:''' Hey! I heard from several people you guys were out trick or treating earlier in Lumbridge, stop playing around and let him go!
* '''Snailneck:''' HAHAHA, silly human think dead goblin can go trick or treat. We are real ghost, only alive goblins can trick or treat.
* '''Player:''' I can see that you are wearing a costume.
* '''Snailneck:''' You need to learn paying respects to the dead. You on our ignore list now.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34===
* '''Player:''' Hi! I just received some interesting news from people around Lumbridge.
* '''epic mager34:''' Finally, I've been cutting down the same tree over and over again. I have level 15 Woodcutting now. I'm going insane.
* '''Player:''' First I spoke to the cook, who told me the golbins were trick or treating.
* '''epic mager34:''' Trick or treat?
* '''Player:''' Yeah, then I spoke to Bob, who told me the goblins fought about the sweets until they couldn't stand up anymore.
* '''epic mager34:''' They knocked each other out... completely? Both of them?
* '''Player:''' That's what I was told.
* '''epic mager34:''' Wait a second, is that why these goblins think they are dead? Maybe they don't remember what happened?
* '''Player:''' I don't know, sounds like a long shot. Wait here, I'll go ask them a trick question to confirm.
* {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to epic mager34 again====
* '''epic mager34:''' Have you talked to the goblins yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the goblins===
* '''Player:''' Hi again!
* '''Snailneck:''' What you want, have you not learned lesson yet?
* '''Player:''' Oh yes, I'm sorry to disturb your... guarding. I just have a question for you, regarding this pathetic prisoner.
* '''epic mager34:''' HEY, I'm right here!
* '''Player:''' Shhh...
* '''Snailneck:''' Yes, what you want to know?
* '''Player:''' What weapon did he use to kill you?
* '''Snailneck:''' Uhhh. I think he use big red dragon-hammer.
* '''Player:''' Oh no, that's horrible. Thanks for letting me know.
* {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to the goblins again====
* '''Snailneck:''' Human, we busy guarding prisoner. You know this.
* '''Player:''' Sorry!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34===
* '''Player:''' Okay, clearly they have no idea of what happened to them, I think you're right. They don't remember anything.
* '''epic mager34:''' And they think I killed them! I just want to get out of here and cook some shrimp.
* '''Player:''' Well, help me come up with a plan to get you out of here. They don't seem very open minded about this whole situation.
* '''epic mager34:''' Hmmm... In order to outsmart these goblins, we need to think like goblins.
* '''Player:''' So you want us to dress in ghost costumes and believe we suddenly died to some player passing by?
* '''epic mager34:''' YES! Brilliant idea!
* '''Player:''' Come again?
* '''epic mager34:''' If you dress up just like them, they might think you're one of them! That way you can distract them and I can escape!
* '''Player:''' You don't actually think they're that stupid, do you?
* '''Player:''' ...
* '''Player:''' You've got a point, worth a try.
* {{tcond|If player does not have a knife in their inventory}}
** '''epic mager34:''' Take my knife and try to find some sheets, so that we can create a costume. I'm pretty sure I saw a bed, close to Bob's house.
** '''Player:''' Thanks, I'll be right back!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If player does have a knife in their inventory}}
** '''epic mager34:''' Try to find some sheets to cut with a knife, so that we can create a costume. I'm pretty sure I saw a bed, close to Bob's house.
** '''Player:''' Sounds like a plan, I'll be right back!
** {{tact|end}}

====Attempting to talk to epic mager34 again====
* '''epic mager34:''' Have you crafted the costume yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet. I need to find the bed around Bob' Axes you were talking about.
* {{tact|end}}

==Ghosts and questions==
===Talking to goblins with the spooky outfit equipped before talking to epic mager34===
* '''Snailneck:''' Whoa, you scare me! We don't know you, leave us alone ghost man.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34 with the spooky outfit===
* '''Player:''' Hey! I got the costume ready!
* {{tcond|If the spooky outfit is in the player's inventory}}
** '''epic mager34:''' Nice, good job! Put it on!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the spooky outfit is partially equipped}}
** '''epic mager34:''' Nice, good job! Equip the full costume!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34 with the spooky outfit equipped===
* '''Player:''' This is the costume, what do you think?
* '''epic mager34:''' Wow, very spooky! Now go pretend you're a goblin, just like them. Then please let me out of here.
* '''Player:''' I'll do my best.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the goblins===
* '''Player:''' Hi there, fellow goblins! it's me, your goblin friend!
* '''Snailneck:''' Hm? You no sound like goblin. Also, why are you tall like tree?
* '''Player:''' Oh. Uhm. Me goblin, just like you. Also dead, because stupid human use stab-stick on me.
* '''Snailneck:''' Hmmm... you seem like goblin after all. You also killed by nasty human?
* '''Player:''' Yes! Human is bad. Also, I see you seem little tired, if you want break I can guard human?
* '''Snailneck:''' I don't know. Something seem wrong. If you really are goblin, prove it.
* '''Player:''' Deal, what you want me doing?
* '''Snailneck:''' First, answer three questions. You ready?
* '''Player:''' Goblin always ready.
* '''Snailneck:''' What is most powerful body armour in this world?
* {{tact|(Numbered options shuffle every time.)}}
* {{topt|Rune platebody.}}
** '''Player:''' Rune platebody!
** '''Snailneck:''' That's not right, you did not pass the test. Start over.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Dragon chainbody.}}
** '''Player:''' Dragon chainbody!
** '''Snailneck:''' That's not right, you did not pass the test. Start over.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Goblin mail.}}
** '''Player:''' Goblin mail!
** '''Snailneck:''' Good, right answer. Next question.
** '''Snailneck:''' Let's say two goblins have different opinion of something. What is best way to solve problem?
** {{tact|(Numbered options shuffle every time.)}}
** {{topt|Ask for a third opinion.}}
*** '''Player:''' Ask for a third opinion?
*** '''Snailneck:''' Wrong answer, are you really goblin?
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Talk it through.}}
*** '''Player:''' Talk it through?
*** '''Snailneck:''' Wrong answer, are you really goblin?
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Fight about it.}}
*** '''Player:''' Fight about it!
*** '''Snailneck:''' Yes! That is right, fight is best way to solve problem! Next question.
*** '''Snailneck:''' What do you do when human kill your friend and family?
*** {{topt|Run away and hide.}}
**** '''Player:''' Run away and hide?
**** '''Snailneck:''' No, this is no correct. Try again.
**** {{tact|end}}
*** {{topt|Ask them nicely to stop.}}
**** '''Player:''' Ask them nicely to stop?
**** '''Snailneck:''' No, this is no correct. Try again.
**** {{tact|end}}
*** {{topt|Put them in prison.}}
**** '''Player:''' Put them in prison!
**** '''Snailneck:''' That's right! You really proved yourself goblin. You are clearly smart like rest of us.
**** '''Player:''' Thanks. I told you I am goblin.
**** '''Snailneck:''' As last task to proive you really are one of us, you need to go in Lumbridge and steal from human. Collect precious item for us.
**** '''Player:''' Steal from human? Is that not little too far?
**** '''Snailneck:''' Really? I thought you were goblin like us.
**** '''Player:''' Oh, ha ha. It was just joke. of course I steal from human, no problem!
**** '''Snailneck:''' Good, go to the general store and steal item.
**** '''Player:''' Okay, I try do my best.
**** '''epic mager34:''' Psst! how is it going?
**** '''Player:''' Almost there! Now these goblins want me to steal something for them. I have to go see if the general store has something interesting to steal.
**** '''epic mager34:''' What if they catch you stealing from them?
**** '''Player:''' I will have to cause some form of distraction. Maybe light something on fire?
**** '''epic mager34:''' I saw a sack with black powder close to the furnace room in Lumbridge. Maybe you could check what it contains?
**** '''Player:''' Sounds like a plan.
**** {{tcond|If player does not have a tinderbox in their inventory}}
***** '''epic mager34:''' Here, you can borrow my tinderbox.
***** {{tact|continue}}
**** {{tcond|If player does have a tinderbox in their inventory}}
***** '''epic mager34:''' I see you already have a tinderbox, try using that one to light the smoke.
***** '''Player:''' Thanks, you'll be out in no time!
***** '''epic mager34:''' Please hurry!
***** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to goblins after answering incorrectly====
=====First question=====
* '''Snailneck:''' Answer me three questions to prove you goblin. You ready?
* '''Player:''' Ready
* {{tact|Quick starts from beginning}}

=====Second question=====
* '''Snailneck:''' One answer right, two questions remain. Here is next question.
* {{tact|Quick starts from second question}}

=====Third question=====
* '''Snailneck:''' Time for third question.
* {{tact|Quick starts from third question}}

==Fire and death==
===Talking to the goblins before stealing the shiny glass===
* '''Snailneck:''' Have you stolen item yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34 before stealing the shiny glass===
* '''epic mager34:''' Have you stolen something from the general store yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet, be right back.
* '''epic mager34:''' See if the black powder, close to Lumbridge furnace could help you cause a distraction of some sort.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to steal the shiny glass without lighting smoke powder===
* '''Stop assistant:''' [Hey! Keep your hands off our products!]
* '''Player:''' The captured player said something about black powder beside a furnace...
* {{Qact|Lighting smoke powder inside the general store, a countdown in the chatbox begins.}}
* {{tbox|5...}}
* {{tbox|4...}}
* {{tbox|3...}}
* {{tbox|2...}}
* {{tbox|1...}}
* {{tbox|0...}}
* {{Qact|Store fills with smoke}}
* '''Shop assistant:''' What on earth?!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to epic mager34===
* '''epic mager34:''' Have you stolen something from the general store yet?
* '''Player:''' Yes, I have it right here!
* '''epic mager34:''' Finally! Show it to the goblins and let's get out of here!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the goblins===
* '''Snailneck:''' Have you stolen item yet?
* '''Player:''' Yes, I have shiny item right here.
* '''Snailneck:''' Hmmm... You did steal shiny object from human after all. I believe you, you are ghost goblin, just like us.
* '''Player:''' I told you!
* '''Snailneck:''' Good job. I think we go on break now, you guard prisoner for us.
* '''Player:''' Of course. Is my duty. Enjoy break, see you later.
* '''Snailneck:''' Bye goblin.
* '''Player:''' See you!
* {{Qact|Cutscene starts}}
* '''Snailneck:''' Finally break time!
* '''Grasslegs:''' Don't let prisoner escape.
* '''Player:''' Of course not, no funny business.
* '''Snailneck:''' See you in a while!
* '''mad melvin96:''' Hey, let me pass through this gate.
* '''Border Guard:''' Pay the 10 gp toll and you can pass through to Al Kharid.
* '''mad melvin96:''' 10 gp? Are you serious?
* '''Border Guard:''' Yes.
* '''Snailneck:''' Phew, we really needed break.
* '''Grasslegs:''' Yeah, guarding all day make me tired.
* '''Snailneck:''' [Not again...]
* '''mad melvin96:''' Any last words, noob goblin?
* '''Grasslegs:''' Small brain human, you can't kill goblin that is already dead.
* '''mad melvin96:''' You're wearing a sheet. I can see your feet sticking out.
* '''Grasslegs:''' Wait, those are my feet? I thought they are grass.
* '''Grasslegs:''' I have feet! I am alive goblin!
* '''mad melvin96:''' [Lol]
* '''mad melvin96:''' A Goblin mail? Nice, I needed an armour upgrade!
* '''epic mager34:''' Wow, you did it! They're gone! I'm free!
* '''Player:''' Yes, finally! Let's home teleport back to Lumbridge.
* '''epic mager34:''' Okay, see you there!
* {{Qact|Player and epic mager34 home teleport back to Lumbridge Castle}}
* '''epic mager34:''' Thank you so much for helping me!
* '''Player:''' No problem, my friend!
* '''epic mager34:''' Do you have any tips on what I should do now?
* '''Player:''' Go cook the shrimp you were talking about, and stay away from the goblins!
* '''epic mager34:''' Sounds like a good idea! I also have something for you, as a thank you for helping me out.
* '''Player:''' Oh, thank you so much!
* '''epic mager34:''' No problem, see you around!
* {{tact|receives=various event rewards}}
* {{Qact|Event complete}}

==Miscellaneous dialogue==
===Talking to either [[Grasslegs]] or [[Snailneck]] with a [[ghostspeak amulet]] equipped===
* '''Player:''' Wooooo wooo wooooo!
* '''Snailneck:''' What you saying human? Stop talking blabberish!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to [[epic mager34]] after finishing the event===
* '''epic mager34:''' Thanks again for saving me from the goblins!
* '''Player:''' No problem at all, glad I could help.
* {{tact|end}}

{{2019 Halloween event}}
